Fig. 7. MoRF and LeRF curves (median ± IQR) for Hybrid supervoxels.

Fig. 1. Coronal examples of (left) Regular FCC supervoxels and (right) Hybrid (organ-aware) FCC supervoxels within the RF-supported crop BRF. Regular FCC provides uniform geometry-driven units, whereas the Hybrid variant further splits FCC cells along organ boundaries to improve anatomical alignment.
